user.title: Connect to Super Productivity
user.description:
Enter the host and port of your Super Productivity desktop app.

Make sure the Local REST API is enabled in Super Productivity:
Settings > Misc > Enable local REST API

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Super Productivity. Ensure the app is running and the Local REST API is enabled.
error.app_not_ready: Super Productivity is running but the app is not ready yet. Please wait and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Super Productivity instance is already configured.
